races.analysis_summary: Small field staying contest. Kohala brings the strongest recent form lines, having placed second at this track and distance last start. Giorgi also boasts course and distance credentials. The wet track should suit the top contenders.

selections.name: Kohala
selections.reason: Coming off a strong 2nd at this track and distance. Handles the conditions and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Giorgi
selections.reason: Proven at this track and trip. Recent form is solid enough to challenge here.

selections.name: Theodor
selections.reason: Third-up today. Best form is competitive, but needs to improve on recent outings.

selections.name: Lillikins
selections.reason: Consistent recent placings suggest a frame finish is possible.

danger_horse.name: Giorgi
danger_horse.reason: Has the ability to win if the top pick falters, especially with the good draw.

races.analysis_summary: Leliyn looks very hard to beat after a narrow defeat at this track and distance last start. The field is relatively weak, with several first starters and resuming runners. Little One showed promise in trials.

selections.name: Leliyn
selections.reason: Just missed at this track/dist last start. Ideally drawn and race fit.

selections.name: Little One
selections.reason: First starter who won a trial. Drawn the rail and respects stable.

selections.name: Golden Tunes
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed ability in debut prep and trials well.

selections.name: Minato
selections.reason: Resuming. Placed on debut and has claims on best form.

danger_horse.name: Little One
danger_horse.reason: Unknown quantity with trial ability and the inside gate.

races.analysis_summary: Mahaler has been knocking on the door with two consecutive second placings. Flying Brant also brings good course form. A competitive maiden.

selections.name: Mahaler
selections.reason: Two starts for two seconds. Ideally drawn to break through today.

selections.name: Flying Brant
selections.reason: Runner-up at this track and distance last start. Must be respected.

selections.name: Hasta La Wizard
selections.reason: Consistent type but hurt by the very wide barrier.

selections.name: Discreetly Blue
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Drawn well.

danger_horse.name: Flying Brant
danger_horse.reason: Proven performer at this track who will be in the finish.

races.analysis_summary: Elegant Lilly was an impressive winner here last time out and maps well again. Rich Lady is consistent and Santasia brings solid form lines.

selections.name: Elegant Lilly
selections.reason: Last start winner at this track/dist. Drawn perfectly to repeat.

selections.name: Rich Lady
selections.reason: Consistent mare who placed 2nd here last start. Reliable.

selections.name: Santasia
selections.reason: Honest campaigner but the wide draw is a slight concern.

selections.name: Fiabesca
selections.reason: Resuming. Won maiden last prep and draws softly.

danger_horse.name: Rich Lady
danger_horse.reason: Rarely runs a bad race and loves this circuit.

races.analysis_summary: Eclair Vitality drops in class from 0-62 grade to 0-56 and looks well placed. Artissi is in great form and All Shot is a threat from a good gate.

selections.name: Eclair Vitality
selections.reason: Drops in grade. 3rd in stronger company last start. The one to beat.

selections.name: Artissi
selections.reason: In excellent form with back-to-back seconds. Will be competitive.

selections.name: All Shot
selections.reason: Solid recent form and draws a favorable gate.

selections.name: Arc De Puissance
selections.reason: Placed recently and maps to get a good run.

danger_horse.name: Artissi
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form makes her the logical threat to the top pick.

races.analysis_summary: A very open handicap. See Ya Later Baby has the draw and ability. Subuki and Mr Jones are consistent types who should be around the mark.

selections.name: See Ya Later Baby
selections.reason: Good draw and has won recently. Maps well.

selections.name: Subuki
selections.reason: Runner-up last start. Rails draw is a big advantage.

selections.name: Mr Jones
selections.reason: Consistent type who is rarely far away.

selections.name: Duo Perna
selections.reason: Mixes form but has ability on his day.

danger_horse.name: Subuki
danger_horse.reason: Inside gate gives her a great chance to dictate or sit close.

races.analysis_summary: Sir Panama and Augusta Rock bring strong, consistent form to this race. Crown And Anchor is a last-start winner who must be respected.

selections.name: Sir Panama
selections.reason: Last start winner who draws perfectly. Hard to go past.

selections.name: Augusta Rock
selections.reason: Runner-up at this track last start. Always competitive.

selections.name: Crown And Anchor
selections.reason: Won well last time out. Good draw keeps him in the mix.

selections.name: Morlaix
selections.reason: Two consecutive second placings. Knocking on the door.

danger_horse.name: Augusta Rock
danger_horse.reason: Veteran who loves a scrap and is in good form.
